headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Lennar, Lowers Price Target to $88
summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains Lennar (NYSE:LEN) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $104 to $88.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Lennar, Lowers Price Target to $88

headline: Is Lennar’s (LEN) Urban Townhome Push Quietly Reshaping Its Asset-Light Strategy?
summary: Lennar recently announced the debut of The Towns at West End in Lancaster, PA and Manhattan Square in Carson, CA, two new-townhome and condominium communities featuring multi-story layouts, modern finishes and community amenities, with prices starting in the high US$500,000s and mid US$700,000s respectively. These launches highlight Lennar’s push into walkable, amenity-rich urban neighborhoods across different regions, broadening its product mix and reaching a wider range of homebuyers. Now...
